name: The Pivot Podcast: Marketing Strategies for Hairstylists
description:
For hairstylists bts the realities of having a business and small business mindset.
Share how to thrive—confidently, consistently, in community and without burnout thru mindfulness. Advocate for simple no burn out social media marketing and prioritizing life over social media.
Hosted by a successful entrepreneur with 9+ years in heart led business, Celeste shares sustainable client retention strategies, sustainable marketing, and realistic time management for busy hairstylists and moms. Stop tra

recent_episodes.title: Instagram Seo Keywords
recent_episodes.description:
Ready to start booking clients without having to post every day on instagram or social media? Then this episode is for you.

Get ready to say goodbye Hashtags# hello keywords with better understanding of how to do it with strategy.


IN THIS EPISODE YOU’LL LEARN:

•What Keywords actually looks like in your content as a hairstylist and business owner

• A sneak peak into the visibility framework I've used for the past few months

• Stop overthinking your cont

recent_episodes.title: Ready to start marketing without social media in 2026. Lessons from my addiction to social media to thriving without it
recent_episodes.description:
It's nearly impossible to think of having a business and not thing you have to start marketing on social media. It's no secret that social media can help you business but what made me make the switch back in 2019..

This is the introduction podcast to my marketing without social media series. Yes! I will be sharing what tools im using and mindset reframes but before that I wanted to share:

-What social media addiction looked like for me

- the moment that changed everything

recent_episodes.title: Business + your values. Being okay with not being accepted by all
recent_episodes.description:
Living in the United States currently has been going thru many hard things collectively and also depending what state you are in. It's important we give each other empathy to the ones that want to speak up and those that don't.


I talked about the consequences to my business for sharing my beliefs and empathy in such a hard time more important than ever.


Next week will go back to marketing episodes but wanted to share this in case it may be helpful to one of y

score_reason: Targets hairstylists with a focus on social media marketing and mindfulness, not relevant to Andreas's B2B and traditional industry expertise.
